name: libtype-tiny-xs-perl
title: libtype-tiny-xs-perl
summary: boost for some of Type::Tiny's built-in type constraints
description:
boost for some of Type::Tiny's built-in type constraints
Type::Tiny is a tiny class for creating Moose-like type constraint
objects which are compatible with Moo, Moose and Mouse.
.
Type::Tiny::XS is optionally used by Type::Tiny to provide faster,
C-based implementations of some type constraints.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtype-tiny-xs-perl because boost for some of Type::Tiny's built-in type constraints.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtype-tiny-xs-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtype-tiny-xs-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtype-tiny-xs-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
